title: smilax kwangsiensis var. kwangsiensis
intro: Smilax kwangsiensis var. kwangsiensis, also known as the Kwangsi Smilax or Chinese Smilax, is a species of flowering plant in the Smilacaceae family, native to southern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Smilax kwangsiensis var. kwangsiensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
